_comment: Phase 6 (Plan 06-01) OAuth revocation fixtures. Used by kernel/src/test/mcp/auth/revocation.spec.ts and kernel/src/test/mcp/clients/adapters/*.spec.ts (Plan 06-04 flips). Each provider key maps to one or more concrete revocation error response payloads matching the provider's documented revocation taxonomy. Slack alone has 3 distinct shapes (per the Pitfall: invalid_auth, account_inactive, token_revoked) which the SlackAdapter must all detect.
